mapper.update: UPDATE emotion_report SET diary_happy = #{diary_happy}, diary_normal = #{diary_normal}, diary_sad = #{diary_sad}, chatbot_happy = #{chatbot_happy}, chatbot_normal = #{chatbot_normal}, chatbot_sad = #{chatbot_sad}, test_happy = #{test_happy}, test_normal = #{test_normal}, test_sad = #{test_sad}, total_happy = #{total_happy}, total_normal = #{total_normal}, total_sad = #{total_sad}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE reportno = #{reportno}
mapper.select: SELECT result, score, TO_CHAR(rdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rdate FROM ( SELECT result, score, rdate FROM Twoweek_test WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY rdate DESC ) t WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
